summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of FitMaxPro application completed. All major features verified: Landing Page sections (Hero, How It Works, Programs, Testimonials, FAQ, CTA, Footer), Login with redirect to dashboard (BUG FIXED from iteration_2), Admin Panel with Workouts tab and cover photo editing, Navigation between pages, Language switching (FR/EN), and QRCode page.

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for workout IDs - duplicate workout_id keys in list rendering. Minor issue, doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Landing Page - Hero section with title 'TRANSFORM YOUR BODY', stats bar (50+ Programs, 1000+ Exercises, 4 Nutrition Plans, 24/7 Support), Get Started button, Login button
Landing Page - How It Works section with 4 steps (Create account, Choose program, Follow sessions, Transform yourself)
Landing Page - Programs section with 4 program cards (Muscle Gain, Weight Loss, Legs & Glutes, Women's Special)
Landing Page - Why FitMaxPro section with 3 feature cards (HD Videos, Rest Timers, Multi-Platform)
Landing Page - Testimonials section with 3 testimonial cards with ratings
Landing Page - FAQ section with 5 accordion items (all working)
Landing Page - CTA section with 'READY TO TRANSFORM YOUR BODY?' and 30-day money-back guarantee badge
Landing Page - Footer with Quick Links, Support, Download buttons (App Store, Google Play), Social icons, Stripe badge
Login Page - Email/password form, Google OAuth button, Sign up link
Login Redirect - User redirected to /dashboard after successful login (BUG FIXED)
Dashboard - Shows user subscription (VIP), workout programs access
Admin Panel - All tabs present: Dashboard, Subscribers, Analytics, Workouts, Create Workout, Nutrition
Admin Panel - Workouts tab with 51 workout items, cover photo edit section working
Navigation - All nav items work when logged in: Home, Dashboard, Workouts, Supplements, Pricing, Admin
Language Toggle - Switches between EN and FR correctly, page content updates appropriately
QRCode Page - QR code image displayed, download button present, share button present
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js: Duplicate React keys warning for workout items - consider using unique identifiers or combining workout_id with index
Navigation.js: Workouts/Supplements nav items only visible when user is logged in - this is by design but should be documented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login redirect to /dashboard is now working correctly. Admin panel fully functional with workout cover photo editing. All landing page sections verified. Language toggle works. QRCode page accessible at /qrcode. The app has 51 workouts and 4 nutrition plans in the database.
bugs_fixed_from_previous_iteration: Login redirect issue (iteration_2) - User now properly redirects to /dashboard after successful login
